error_signature: variables return undefined after first iteration
title: Variables become undefined after first loop iteration
symptom: Variables set in the true branch of an If Node are not accessible in the false branch, returning 'undefined'.
not_this_if: Variables are correctly set and accessed in all branches
root_cause: In n8n, when using conditional branches, variables set in one branch may not be accessible in another unless explicitly passed. This is due to the way data is scoped within the workflow execution context.
fix_steps: In the Edit Field 2 node, reference the loop input data using $('Loop Over Items').all()[0].json.Bild or $input.first().json.Bild.
Ensure that both branches of the If Node output the same field name for consistency.
agent_instruction: Use the loop input data reference in the Edit Field 2 node to access the variable.
